ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Plaintiff John Morken present in pro per, was sworn & examined.
PLTF EXH #1 - Check #3061 in the amount of $9,000.00 --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Check #3058 in the amount of $4,400.00 --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Check #3059 in the amount of $3,900.00 --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #4 - Returned Check notice from Bank of America ------------ ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants Daniel M. Staats and Rob Gindt
Principal Damages of $8,300.00.
Treble Damages $4,500.00.
Costs of $336.00
For the total of $13,136.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of exhibis in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2003 Continued To Feb-25-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-24-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
